caption: Paya Lebar Air Base runway viewed from above, showing the wide paved runway surface with centre line markings and grass safety strips on either side. Taxiway connectors are visible, and dense tropical forest lines the right edge. The airbase is a major RSAF facility slated for relocation, with the 800-hectare site to be redeveloped as a new urban district — one of Singapore's most significant future land releases.

analysis.notable: Paya Lebar Air Base runway — the RSAF facility whose planned relocation will unlock 800 hectares for Singapore's largest urban redevelopment since independence.
